skills.name: GraphQL Schema
skills.description: Design GraphQL schemas with types, queries, mutations, subscriptions, and resolvers. Outputs schema definitions and implementation patterns.
skills.promptPreview: Design GraphQL schemas with types, queries, mutations, subscriptions, resolvers, and implementation patterns.

skills.name: WebSocket Design
skills.description: Design WebSocket architecture for real-time communication. Outputs connection management, message protocols, scaling, and fallback strategies.
skills.promptPreview: Design production WebSocket systems with connection lifecycle, message protocols, horizontal scaling, reconnection, and HTTP fallback.
